Found 6 files
server/skillhub-domain/src/main/java/com/iflytek/skillhub/domain/skill/service/SkillPublishService.java
server/skillhub-domain/src/main/java/com/iflytek/skillhub/domain/skill/validation/BasicPrePublishValidator.java
server/skillhub-domain/src/main/java/com/iflytek/skillhub/domain/skill/validation/NoOpPrePublishValidator.java
server/skillhub-domain/src/main/java/com/iflytek/skillhub/domain/skill/validation/PrePublishValidator.java
server/skillhub-domain/src/test/java/com/iflytek/skillhub/domain/skill/service/SkillPublishServiceTest.java
server/skillhub-domain/src/test/java/com/iflytek/skillhub/domain/skill/validation/BasicPrePublishValidatorTest.java
server/skillhub-domain/src/main/java/com/iflytek/skillhub/domain/skill/validation/BasicPrePublishValidator.java

1	package com.iflytek.skillhub.domain.skill.validation;
2	
3	import com.iflytek.skillhub.domain.skill.metadata.SkillMetadata;
4	import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
5	
6	import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
7	import java.util.List;
8	import java.util.Map;
9	
10	import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertFalse;
11	import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertTrue;
12	
13	class BasicPrePublishValidatorTest {
14	
15	    private final BasicPrePublishValidator validator = new BasicPrePublishValidator();
16	
17	    @Test
18	    void shouldRejectObviousCredentialLeakWithHelpfulLocation() {
19	        PackageEntry skillMd = new PackageEntry(
20	                "SKILL.md",
21	                """
22	                ---
23	                name: Secret Skill
24	                version: 1.0.0
25	                ---
26	                token=sk-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456
27	                """.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8),
28	                91,
29	                "text/markdown"
30	        );
31	
32	        ValidationResult result = validator.validate(new PrePublishValidator.SkillPackageContext(
33	                List.of(skillMd),
34	                new SkillMetadata("Secret Skill", "desc", "1.0.0", "body", Map.of()),
35	                "user-1",
36	                1L
37	        ));
38	
39	        assertFalse(result.passed());
40	        assertTrue(result.errors().stream().anyMatch(error ->
41	                error.contains("SKILL.md")
42	                        && error.contains("line 5")
43	                        && error.contains("looks like a")));
44	    }
45	
46	    @Test
47	    void shouldAllowOrdinaryTextFiles() {
48	        PackageEntry skillMd = new PackageEntry(
49	                "SKILL.md",
50	                """
51	                ---
52	                name: Safe Skill
53	                version: 1.0.0
54	                ---
55	                """.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8),
56	                45,
57	                "text/markdown"
58	        );
59	        PackageEntry readme = new PackageEntry(
60	                "README.md",
61	                "This skill documents safe usage.".getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8),
62	                31,
63	                "text/markdown"
64	        );
65	
66	        ValidationResult result = validator.validate(new PrePublishValidator.SkillPackageContext(
67	                List.of(skillMd, readme),
68	                new SkillMetadata("Safe Skill", "desc", "1.0.0", "body", Map.of()),
69	                "user-1",
70	                1L
71	        ));
72	
73	        assertTrue(result.passed());
74	    }
75	
76	    @Test
77	    void shouldIgnoreObviousPlaceholderSecrets() {
78	        PackageEntry skillMd = new PackageEntry(
79	                "SKILL.md",
80	                """
81	                ---
82	                name: Example Skill
83	                version: 1.0.0
84	                ---
85	                token=YOUR_TOKEN_HERE
86	                api_key=example-key-value
87	                """.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8),
88	                102,
89	                "text/markdown"
90	        );
91	
92	        ValidationResult result = validator.validate(new PrePublishValidator.SkillPackageContext(
93	                List.of(skillMd),
94	                new SkillMetadata("Example Skill", "desc", "1.0.0", "body", Map.of()),
95	                "user-1",
96	                1L
97	        ));
98	
99	        assertTrue(result.passed());
100	    }
101	}
102

content.content:
diff --git a/server/skillhub-domain/src/main/java/com/iflytek/skillhub/domain/skill/validation/BasicPrePublishValidator.java b/server/skillhub-domain/src/main/java/com/iflytek/skillhub/domain/skill/validation/BasicPrePublishValidator.java
index c61e420..4d5d13c 100644
--- a/server/skillhub-domain/src/main/java/com/iflytek/skillhub/domain/skill/validation/BasicPrePublishValidator.java
+++ b/server/skillhub-domain/src/main/java/com/iflytek/skillhub/domain/skill/validation/BasicPrePublishValidator.java
@@ -24,8 +24,8 @@ public class BasicPrePublishValidator implements PrePublishValidator {
             new SecretRule(Pattern.compile("(ghp_[A-Za-z0-9]{20,})"), 1, "GitHub token"),
             new SecretRule(Pattern.compile("(sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{20,})"), 1, "API key"),
             new SecretRule(
-                    Pattern.compile("(?i)(api[_-]?key|access[_-]?key|secret|password|token)\\s*[:=]\\s*['\\\"]?([A-Za-z0-9_\\-]{12,})"),
-                    2,
+                    Pattern.compile("(?i)(api[_-]?key|access[_-]?key|secret|password|token)\\s*[:=]\\s*(['\\\"])([^'\\\"]{12,})\\2"),
+                    3,
                     "secret or token")
     );

@@ -24,8 +24,8 @@ public class BasicPrePublishValidator implements PrePublishValidator {
             new SecretRule(Pattern.compile("(ghp_[A-Za-z0-9]{20,})"), 1, "GitHub token"),
             new SecretRule(Pattern.compile("(sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{20,})"), 1, "API key"),
             new SecretRule(
-                    Pattern.compile("(?i)(api[_-]?key|access[_-]?key|secret|password|token)\\s*[:=]\\s*['\\\"]?([A-Za-z0-9_\\-]{12,})"),

+                    Pattern.compile("(?i)(api[_-]?key|access[_-]?key|secret|password|token)\\s*[:=]\\s*(['\\\"])([^'\\\"]{12,})\\2"),

     );

content.text:
Implemented the fix in:

- `server/skillhub-domain/src/main/java/com/iflytek/skillhub/domain/skill/validation/BasicPrePublishValidator.java`

What changed:
- Tightened the generic `api_key/access_key/secret/password/token` assignment heuristic so it only flags quoted literal values:
  - Still flags: `token = "real-looking-secret-value"`
  - No longer flags: `token = extract_group_token_value(response, group_choice.group_id)`

Validation performed:
- Added a temporary regression test reproducing the false positive.
- Confirmed it failed before/was addressed by the fix and passed after the fix.
- Removed the temporary regression test as requested.
- Re-ran the existing validator tests after cleanup:

```text
/testbed/server/mvnw -f /testbed/server/pom.xml -pl skillhub-domain -Dtest=BasicPrePublishValidatorTest test
```

Result:

```text
Tests run: 3, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0
BUILD SUCCESS
```

No commits were made.
